page_content:
ELEMENTARY EDUCATION

MAJOR

2311 Benjamin Building

Phone: 301-405-3324

http://education.umd.edu/academics/departments/tlpl/

Program Co-Directors: Tracy Dunheimer, Principal Faculty Specialist; Karen Rehder, Principal Faculty Specialist.

Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership offers an undergraduate curriculum in elementary education that leads to the Bachelor of Science. Courses offered in this program may be found under the following acronyms: EDCI, and TLPL. Graduates of the Elementary Education program are prepared to teach grades 1 through 6, and meet the requirements for certiﬁcation in Maryland and additional states that are afﬁliated with the Interstate Reciprocity Agreement through the Maryland State Department of Education (MSDE).
